headline: State Street Corporation 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
summary: BOSTON, May 15, 2026--As previously announced, State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT) will hold the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Wednesday, May 20, 2026 at 9:00 a.m. ET. The Annual Meeting of Shareholders will be conducted online via live audio webcast at www.virtualshareholdermeeting.com/STT2026. State Street’s Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Ronald P. O’Hanley, will provide brief remarks and respond to shareholder submitted questions.

headline: STATE STREET CORP (NYSE:STT) Scores Rare Perfect Technical Rating and High-Quality Bull Flag Setup
summary: State Street Corp shows a strong technical breakout setup with a perfect 10/10 Technical Rating and 9/10 Setup Quality, featuring a bull flag pattern ideal for momentum traders.
